task_description: Phase 4: Add Config REST API endpoints, build functional Settings page, enhance all dashboard pages (personas, index, stocks) with improved UI/UX, responsive CSS, and update README

verification.summary: All 55 tests pass (13 new API tests + 42 existing). Dashboard imports OK. Config management works. CSS includes responsive, toast, and animation styles. README updated with v4.1 entry and API docs. Security review addressed: path traversal fix, YAML validation, agent_id existence checks.
